user_feedback: can you make it so that the game just freezes without the text and graying out. but also don't hide the hud when paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (ESC key), the HUD is currently hidden. The user wants the game to freeze in place with the HUD still visible, without any overlay text or graying effects.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add renderHUD(p) call to the PAUSED case in the draw() function so the HUD remains visible when paused.
